chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 361 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Application in disposed of case 1. For orders on MA No.7103/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.7104/2025 (Ex./A) 3. For orders on MA No.7105/2025 (R/Surety) 18.12.2025 Mr. Nasir Ali Rajput, Advocate for applicant / surety..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. This application has been filed by the applicant seeking return of surety amount. As per contentions of learned Counsel, supported by report of Accountant of this Court, it appears that accused Tahir Mehmood was granted interim pre-arrest bail by this Court vide order dated 02.05.2025, subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.1,00,000/-, for which the applicant stood surety by depositing cash amount of Rs.1,00,000/- vide office receipt No.5365 dated 02.05.2025. Thereafter, the bail application of accused was dismissed as not pressed by this Court vide order dated 29.09.2025 on account of disposal of the case under ‘C’ class, wherein the accused has been released, as is evident from the order dated 17.09.2025 of learned Judicial Magistrate-I, Naushahro Feroze, annexed with this application. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, learned Additional Prosecutor General, present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice and does not oppose this application. Accordingly, the application is allowed. Office is directed to return the surety amount to the applicant after proper identification and verification, as per rules. J U D G E Abdul Basit
